title: Senior Teacher - Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates:
Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jamboree Education Asia Pacific Associates!
